questions.name: gpaq0:work_vigorous_intensity
questions.description: Q2. Does your work involve vigorous intensity activity that causes large increase in breathing or heart rate like (carrying or lifting heavy loads, digging or construction work) for atleast 10 minutes continuously?

questions.name: gpaq0:days_vigorous_intensity
questions.description: Q3. In a typical week, on how many days do you do vigorous intensity activities as part of your work?

questions.name: gpaq0:time_vigorous_intensity
questions.description: Q4. How much time do you do vigorous - intensity activities at work on a typical day?

questions.name: gpaq0:work_moderate_intensity
questions.description: Q5. Does your work involve moderate-intensity activity, that causes small increases in breathing or heart rate such as brisk walking [or carrying light loads] for at least 10 minutes continuously?

questions.name: gpaq0:days_moderate_intensity
questions.description: Q6. In a typical week, on how many days do you do moderate intensity activities as part of your work?

questions.name: gpaq0:time_moderate_intensity
questions.description: Q7. How much time do you do moderate - intensity activities at work on a typical day?

questions.name: gpaq1:walk_bicycle
questions.description: Q8. Do you walk or use a bicycle (pedal cycle) for at least 10 minutes continuously to get to and from places?

questions.name: gpaq1:week_n_walk_bicycle
questions.description: Q9. In a typical week, on how many days do you walk or bicycle for at least 10 minutes to get to and from places?

questions.name: gpaq1:time_walk_bicycle
questions.description: Q10. How much time do you spend walking or bicycling for travel on a typical day?

questions.name: gpaq2:sports_vigorous_intensity
questions.description:
Q11. Do you do any vigorous- intensity sports, fitness or recreational (leisure) activities that cause large increase in
breathing or heart rate like (running or football) for at least 10 minutes continuously?

questions.name: gpaq2:week_sports_vigorous_intensity
questions.description:
Q12. In a typical week, on how many days do you do vigorous- intensity sports, fitness or recreational (leisure)
activities?

questions.name: gpaq2:time_sports_vigorous_intensity
questions.description: Q13. How much time do you spend doing vigorous- intensity sports, fitness or recreational activities on a typical day?

questions.name: gpaq2:increase_heartrate_sports_vigorous_intensity
questions.description:
Q14. Do you do any moderate-intensity sports, fitness or recreational (leisure) activities that cause a small increase
in breathing or heart rate such as brisk walking, [cycling, swimming, volleyball] for at least 10 minutes continuously?

questions.name: gpaq2:week_increase_heartrate_sports_vigorous_intensity
questions.description:
Q15. In a typical week, on how many days do you do moderate- intensity sports, fitness or recreational (leisure)
activities?

questions.name: gpaq2:time_increase_heartrate_sports_vigorous_intensity
questions.description:
Q16. How much time do you spend doing moderate- intensity sports, fitness or recreational activities on a typical
day?

questions.name: gpaq3:note64
questions.description: Q17. How much time do you usually spend sitting or reclining on a typical day?

questions.name: nicotine_use_1:smoked_tobacco
questions.description: Q18. Have you ever smoked tobacco [cigarette, beedi, cigar, hookah] or used smokeless tobacco [such as chewingtobacco, gutka, pan masala, etc]

questions.name: nicotine_use_2:currently_smoke
questions.description: Q19. Do you currently smoke, chew, or sniff tobacco or have you quit?

questions.name: nicotine_use_2:age_stopped
questions.description: Q19. At what age did you totally quit from smoking or consuming tobacco? (age in years)

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:smoke_grams
questions.description: Q20. Please tell me approximately how many grams of tobacco (per month) you normally consume (chewing or sniffing)

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:timesday_chew_sniff
questions.description: Q21. How many times per day do you chew or sniff tobacco?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:cigars_beedis
questions.description: Q22. How many cigarrettes or beedis do you smoke per day?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:age_start_smoke
questions.description: Q23. How old were you (age in years) when you first started smoking or using smokeless tobacco?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:fagerstorm_test
questions.description: If smoking currently: Fagerstrom Test for Nicotine dependence

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnd_1
questions.description: Q24. How soon after waking up do you smoke your first cigarette?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnd_2
questions.description: Q25. Do you find it difficult to refrain from smoking in places where it is forbidden? E.g. church, Library, etc.

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnd_3
questions.description: Q26. Which cigarette would you hate to give up?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnd_4
questions.description: Q27. How many cigarettes a day do you smoke?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnd_5
questions.description: Q28. Do you smoke more frequently in the morning?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnd_6
questions.description: Q29. Do you smoke even if you are sick in bed most of the day?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnd_st1
questions.description: If using smokeless tobacco, then rate the participant on Fagerstrom Test for Nicotine dependence-Smokeless Tobacco

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnds_1
questions.description: Q30. How soon after you wake up to do you place your first dip?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnds_2
questions.description: Q31. How often do you intentionally swallow tobacco juice?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnds_3
questions.description: Q32. Which chew would you hate to give up most?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnds_4
questions.description: Q33. How many cans/pouches per week do you use?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnds_5
questions.description: Q34. Do you chew more frequently during first hours after awakening than during the rest of the day?

questions.name: nicotine_use_3:ftnds_6
questions.description: Q35. Do you chew if you are so ill that you are in bed most of the day?

questions.name: alcohol_use_1:consumed_alcohol
questions.description: Q36. Have you ever consumed any alcoholic beverages such as beer, wine, liquor, country liquor etc.?

questions.name: alcohol_use_1a:currently_drink
questions.description: Q37. Do you currently drink any alcoholic beverages such as beer, wine, liquor, etc.(in the last one year)?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:audit_interview
questions.description: The Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:often_drink
questions.description: Q38. How often do you have drink containing alcohol?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:alcohol_drink_day
questions.description: Q39. How many drinks containing alcohol do you have on a typical day when you are doing?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:occasion_drink
questions.description: Q40. How often do you have six or more drinks on one occasion?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:stop_drink
questions.description: Q41. How often during the last year have you found that you were not able to stop drinking once you had started?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:failed_normal_activity
questions.description: Q42. How often during the last year have you failed to do what was normally expected from you because of drinking?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:drink_morning
questions.description: Q43. How often during the last year have you needed a first drink in the morning to get yourself going after a heavy drinking season?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:guilt_drink
questions.description: Q44. How often during the last year have you had a feeling of guilt or remorse after drinking?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:unable_remember
questions.description: Q45. How often during the last year have you been unable to remember what happened the night before because you had been drinking?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:injured_drinking
questions.description: Q46. Have you or someone else been injured as a result of your drinking?

questions.name: alcohol_use_2:concern_drink
questions.description: Q47. Has a relative or friend or a doctor or another health worker been concerned about your drinking or suggetsed you cut down?

questions.name: gds2:satisfied
questions.description: Q48. Are you basically satisfied with your life?

questions.name: gds2:dropped_activites
questions.description: Q49. Have you dropped many of your activities and interests?

questions.name: gds2:feel_empty
questions.description: Q50. Do you feel that your life is empty?

questions.name: gds2:bored
questions.description: Q51. Do you often get bored?

questions.name: gds2:hopeful
questions.description: Q52. Are you hopeful about the future?

questions.name: gds2:bothered
questions.description: Q53. Are you bothered by thoughts that you just cannot get out of your head?

questions.name: gds2:good_spirits
questions.description: Q54. Are you in good spirits most of the time?

questions.name: gds2:afraid
questions.description: Q55. Are you afraid that something bad is going to happen to you?

questions.name: gds2:feel_happy
questions.description: Q56. Do you feel happy most of the time?

questions.name: gds2:feel_helpless
questions.description: Q57. Do you often feel helpless?

questions.name: gds2:restless
questions.description: Q58. Do you often get restless and fidgety?

questions.name: gds2:prefer_home
questions.description: Q59. Do you prefer to stay home, rather than go out and do new things?

questions.name: gds2:frequent_worry
questions.description: Q60. Do you frequently worry about the future?

questions.name: gds2:memory_problems
questions.description: Q61. Do you feel that you have more problems with memory than most?

questions.name: gds2:alive_wonderful
questions.description: Q62. Do you think it is wonderful to be alive now?

questions.name: gds3:feel_downhearted
questions.description: Q63. Do you often feel downhearted and blue?

questions.name: gds3:feel_worthless
questions.description: Q64. Do you feel pretty worthless the way you are now?

questions.name: gds3:worry_past
questions.description: Q65. Do you worry a lot about the past?

questions.name: gds3:life_exciting
questions.description: Q66. Do you find life very exciting?

questions.name: gds3:hard_get_started
questions.description: Q67. Is it hard for you to get started on new projects?

questions.name: gds3:feel_energy
questions.description: Q68. Do you feel full of energy?

questions.name: gds3:feel_hopeless
questions.description: Q69. Do you feel that your situation is hopeless?

questions.name: gds3:people_better
questions.description: Q70. Do you think that most people are better off than you are?

questions.name: gds3:upset_frequent
questions.description: Q71. Do you frequently get upset over little things?

questions.name: gds3:feel_crying
questions.description: Q72. Do you frequently feel like crying?

questions.name: gds3:trouble_concentrate
questions.description: Q73. Do you have trouble concentrating?

questions.name: gds3:enjoy_wake_morning
questions.description: Q74. Do you enjoy getting up in the morning?

questions.name: gds3:avoid_social_gathering
questions.description: Q75. Do you prefer to avoid social gatherings?

questions.name: gds3:make_decisions
questions.description: Q76. Is it easy for you to make decisions?

questions.name: gds3:clear_mind
questions.description: Q77. Is your mind as clear as it used to be?

questions.name: family_history_1:memory_loss
questions.description:
Q99. Have any of your close relatives such as parents, brothers or sisters had the problem of serious loss of memory
leading to problems with looking after themselves?

questions.name: family_history_2:problem_relatives
questions.description: Q100. Which relatives had this problem?

questions.name: family_history_2:relatives_heart_attack
questions.description: Q101. Did any of your relatives have a heart attack (or die suddenly and unexpectedly)?

questions.name: family_history_2:relatives_stroke
questions.description: Q102. Have any of your relatives had a stroke or sudden weakness or speech difficulty?

questions.name: family_history_2:relatives_bp
questions.description: Q103. Have any of your relatives had high blood pressure?

questions.name: family_history_2:relatives_diabetes
questions.description: Q104. Have you or any of your family had diabetes?

questions.name: family_history_2:relatives_pd
questions.description: Q105. Have you or any of your family had Parkinson's disease, i.e. marked tremor or stiffness?

questions.name: family_history_2:relatives_depression
questions.description: Q106. Have you or any of your family had depression/anxiety?

questions.name: sleep_1:bed_time
questions.description: Q107. a. When have you usually gone to bed? (Time)

questions.description: Q107. a. When have you usually gone to bed? (AM/PM)

questions.description: Q107. b. How long has it taken you to fall asleep each night?

questions.name: sleep_1:time_awake
questions.description: Q107. c. What time have you usually gotten up in the morning?

questions.name: sleep_1:spend_inbed
questions.description: Q107. i. Number of hours spend in bed?

questions.name: sleep_1:asleep_hours
questions.description: Q107 d. Number of hours asleep?

questions.name: sleep_2:often_trouble_sleep
questions.description: Q108. During the past one month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you

questions.description: Q108. i. Cannot get to sleep within 30 min

questions.name: sleep_2:wakeup_middle
questions.description: Q108. ii. Wake up in the middle of the night or early morning

questions.name: sleep_2:getup_bathroom
questions.description: Q108. iii. Have to get up to use the bathroom

questions.name: sleep_2:cough_snore
questions.description: Q108. v. Cough or snore loudly

questions.name: sleep_2:often_trouble_month
questions.description: Q109. How often during the past month have you had trouble sleeping because of this?

questions.name: sleep_3:rate_sleepquality
questions.description: Q110. During the past one month, how would you rate your sleep quality overall?

questions.name: sleep_3:sleep_medication
questions.description: Q111. During the past month, how often have you taken medicine (prescribed over the counter) to help you sleep?

questions.name: sleep_3:stay_awake
questions.description: Q112. During the past month, how often have you had trouble staying awake while driving, eating meals or engaging in social activity?

questions.name: sleep_3:keep_enthusiasm_1
questions.description: Q113. During the past month, how much of a problem has it been for you to keep up enough enthusiasm to get things done?

questions.description: Q114. Do you have a bed partner / roommate?

questions.description: Q115. If you have a room mate or a bed partner, ask him/her how often in the past month you have had:

questions.name: sleep_4:jerking
questions.description: Q115. c. legs twitching or jerking while you sleep

questions.name: sleep_4:disorientation_sleep
questions.description: Q115. d. episodes of disorientation or confusion during sleep

questions.name: sleep_4:restlessness
questions.description: Q115. e. other restlessness while you sleep

questions.description: Q121.  a. If yes, please mention the frequency

questions.name: sni1:sni_1
questions.description: Q124. Which of the following best describes your marital status?

questions.name: sni1:sni_2
questions.description: Q125. How many children do you have?

questions.name: sni2:sni_3
questions.description: Q125.  a. How many of your children do you see or talk to on the phone at least once every 2 weeks?

questions.name: sni2:sni_4
questions.description: Q126. Are either of your parents living?

questions.name: sni3:sni_5
questions.description: Q126.  a. Do you see or talk on the phone to either of your parents at least once every 2 weeks?

questions.name: sni3:sni_6
questions.description: Q127. Are either of your in-laws (or partner's parents) living?

questions.name: sni4:sni_7
questions.description: Q127.  a. Do you see or talk on the phone to either of your partner's parents at least once every 2 weeks?

questions.name: sni4:sni_8
questions.description: Q128. How many other relatives (other than your spouse, parents & children) do you feel close to?

questions.name: sni5:sni_9
questions.description: Q128.  a. How many of these relatives do you see or talk to on the phone at least once every 2 weeks?

questions.name: sni5:sni_10
questions.description: Q129. How many close friends do you have? (meaning people that you feel at ease with, can talk to about private matters, and can call on for help)

questions.name: sni6:sni_11
questions.description: Q129.  a. How many of these friends do you see or talk to at least once every 2 weeks?

questions.name: sni7:sni_12
questions.description: Q130. Do you belong to a church, temple, or other religious group?

questions.name: sni8:sni_13
questions.description: Q130. a. How many members of your church or religious group do you talk to at least once every 2 weeks? (This includes at group meetings and services.)

questions.name: sni8:sni_14
questions.description: Q131. Do you attend any classes (school, university, technical training, or adult education) on a regular basis?

questions.name: sni9:sni_15
questions.description: Q131.  a. How many fellow students or teachers do you talk to at least once every 2 weeks? (This includes at class meetings.)

questions.name: sni9:sni_16
questions.description: Q132. Are you currently employed either full or part-time?

questions.name: sni10:sni_17
questions.description: Q132.  a. How many people do you supervise?

questions.name: sni10:sni_18
questions.description: Q133. How many people work along with you?

questions.name: sni10:otherthan_supervise
questions.description: Q133.  other than those you supervise

questions.name: sni10:sni_19
questions.description: Q134. How many of your neighbors do you visit or talk to at least once every 2 weeks?

questions.name: sni10:sni_20
questions.description: Q135. Are you currently involved in regular volunteer work?

questions.name: sni11:sni_21

questions.name: sni12:sni_23
questions.description: Q136. a. Consider those groups in which you talk to a fellow group member at least once every 2 weeks. Please provide the following information for each such group: the name or type of group and the total number of members in that group that you talk to at least once every 2 weeks.

questions.name: sni12:sni_24
questions.description: Q136. Total number of group members

questions.name: sni12:sni_25
questions.description: Q136. Group that you talk to at least once every 2 weeks

questions.name: sni12:sni_26
questions.description: Q136. No. of times per month
